name: cast-subagents
description: Suggest-only subagent delegation guidance for Codex tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Suggest subagent lineups without auto-spawning them.
interface.longDescription: Use Cast Subagents to decide when a Codex task merits a subagent lineup, present one concise recommendation, and require explicit approval before delegation.
defaultPrompt: Review this branch for bugs, tests, security, and risk.
Map code paths and verify docs before changing code.
